_meta.description: BDC (Business Development Bank of Canada) micro-loans and small business financing. Federal Crown corporation offering flexible loans to entrepreneurs who may not qualify for traditional bank financing.

program_name_en: BDC — Business Development Bank of Canada Financing
program_name_fr: BDC — Banque de développement du Canada
plain_language_summary: The BDC is Canada's bank for entrepreneurs. Unlike regular banks, BDC's mandate is to support businesses that may not qualify for traditional financing. Their loans have flexible terms and they don't just look at credit scores — they look at your business plan and potential. They often partner with Futurpreneur for the matching $55,000 component.

amount.larger_loans: Up to several million for established businesses
amount.note: For micro-businesses and startups, typical range is $10,000–$100,000

programs.name: BDC Small Business Loan
programs.plain_language: General business loan with flexible terms. More patient than a bank — they understand business takes time.
programs.interest_rate: Floating rate — BDC base rate + spread. Typically competitive with or slightly above bank rates.
programs.collateral: Sometimes required, sometimes not — depends on amount and risk

programs.name: Futurpreneur BDC Match Loan
programs.plain_language: If you get a Futurpreneur loan, BDC can match up to $55,000 more (total $75,000 combined). You apply through Futurpreneur and they refer you to BDC.
programs.note: This is the most common BDC product for young entrepreneurs — accessed through Futurpreneur

immigration_status.note: BDC requires Canadian citizenship or permanent residency
immigration_status.future_eligibility: Eligible immediately upon receiving permanent residency

eligible: Startups with a strong business plan
business_stage.note: BDC is more startup-friendly than traditional banks

what_they_look_at: Quality and realism of your business plan

credit_history.minimum_required: No hard minimum — but poor credit history requires explanation and strong business case
credit_history.note: BDC works with entrepreneurs with imperfect credit more than traditional banks would

bdc_advisory_services.name: BDC Advisory Services
bdc_advisory_services.cost: Fee-based for most services, but initial consultations often free

free_resources.name: BDC Business Templates and Tools
free_resources.note: Free business plan templates, financial calculators, market research guides

free_resources.name: BDC Learning Platform
free_resources.note: Free online courses on business topics

montreal_office.address: 500 Place d'Armes, Suite 2900, Montréal, QC H2Y 2W2

what_you_need_to_apply: Proof of citizenship or permanent residency

timeline.note: BDC is generally faster than traditional banks for small business loans

common_mistakes: Thinking you need perfect credit — BDC is more flexible than banks
Applying without a business plan — non-negotiable requirement
Not using BDC's free templates and tools before applying
Not knowing about the Futurpreneur-BDC match — if you're 18-39, apply through Futurpreneur first to access both
government_body: Business Development Bank of Canada (federal Crown corporation)
